description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are primarily white with large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the living space. The house features an attached garage with space for two vehicles, visible from the front, and a wooden staircase leading to a potential upper level or loft. The interior is open-plan, with a living area furnished with brown sofas and a dining table, and a kitchen area with visible cabinetry and appliances. The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is marked by a set of double glass doors. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on functionality and open space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and an attached two-car garage. The design is minimalist with an open-plan interior and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the attached garage with two cars, the main living area, and the staircase leading upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, the row of windows, and the open-plan living and dining area.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the open living space, kitchen, and large glass doors leading outside.
description_view_3: Back view showing the kitchen area, staircase, and a more enclosed section of the house with fewer windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with no porch or overhang, minimalistic and flush with the facade
